documentation.description:
Management Data Input/Output interface abstraction.
AKA Station management interface (SMI).
Abstract interface type for MDIO operations

access_types.name: MDIO_Interface_Access
access_types.code:
type MDIO_Interface_Access is access all
  MDIO_Interface'Class with Storage_Size => 0;

subprograms.name: Read_Register

documentation.description: Read a register from a PHY

parameters.name: Register
parameters.description: Address of the register to read

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Output parameter to hold the read value

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description: Output parameter to indicate if the read was successful

subprograms.name: Write_Register

documentation.description: Write a value to a register of a PHY

parameters.name: Register
parameters.description: Address of the register to write

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value to write to the register

parameters.name: Success
parameters.description: Output parameter to indicate if the write was successful
